landing_page_description: I specialize in building user-centered web and mobile applications, occasionally designing when needed, and handling DevOps to ensure smooth delivery.

about_section.title: About Me

intro.before_highlight: Hi, I'm Fakhri - a developer who loves turning ideas into real products. I'm passionate about building
intro.after_highlight: web and mobile applications. While my day-to-day work centers on Back-End development, I'm comfortable working across the full stack when needed and I'm currently expanding my skills in DevOps.

about_section.stack: I mainly work with JavaScript, TypeScript, Golang, and modern backend frameworks, along with various SQL and NoSQL databases.
about_section.hobbies: Outside of coding, I enjoy staying active through sports such as football, futsal, volleyball, running, and going to the gym. I also love watching movies or series, listening to music, and reading books.

skills_section.description: A collection of tools and technologies I use to build scalable and production-ready applications

backend.title: Backend Development
backend.description: Building APIs, managing databases, implementing authentication, and designing scalable system architecture.

frontend.title: Frontend Development
frontend.description: Crafting responsive interfaces, managing application state, and delivering fast, user-friendly experiences.

devops.title: DevOps & Infrastructure
devops.description: Streamlining deployment, automating CI/CD pipelines, managing containers, and monitoring production systems.

experience_section.description: A snapshot of my professional growth and career path
